dashboard.scanPlaceholder: Paste text to scan for PII... (e.g. John Doe, john@email.com, SSN: 123-45-6789)

playground.title: Tokenization Playground
playground.subtitle: Replace PII with reversible tokens — the GuardForge advantage
playground.backend_offline_hint: Start the GuardForge backend on port 8004 to use the Playground.
playground.paste_placeholder: Paste text containing PII to tokenize...
playground.click_restore: Click Restore to reveal original values
playground.explainer_body: Send only tokens to OpenAI / Anthropic — real names, IBANs, and emails never leave your infrastructure. After the LLM responds, GuardForge restores the real values using the session vault. Zero PII leakage.

reports.title: Compliance Reports
reports.subtitle: Compliance & risk analytics
reports.empty_state: No scans in this period — try the Playground or Scanner first
reports.empty_state_subtitle: Click Refresh to load data, or use the Scanner / Playground first.

scanner.title: Scan Text for PII
scanner.placeholder:
Paste text to scan for PII...

Example: My name is John Doe, email john@example.com, SSN 123-45-6789, phone (555) 123-4567

descriptions.permissive: Warn on PII but allow processing
descriptions.hipaa: HIPAA compliance — block all health-related PII
descriptions.eu_ai_act: EU AI Act compliance — minimize PII in high-risk AI systems
descriptions.ccpa: CCPA / CPRA compliance — anonymize California consumer data
descriptions.lgpd: LGPD compliance — anonymize Brazilian personal data
descriptions.pipeda: PIPEDA compliance — anonymize Canadian personal data
descriptions.appi: APPI compliance — anonymize Japanese personal data
descriptions.pdpa_sg: PDPA Singapore compliance — anonymize personal data
descriptions.popia: POPIA compliance — anonymize South African personal data
descriptions.dpdp_in: DPDP Act compliance — anonymize Indian personal data
descriptions.pipl_cn: PIPL compliance — block cross-border PII transfers
descriptions.privacy_au: Privacy Act 1988 compliance — anonymize Australian personal data

audit.scanToGenerate: Scan text to generate audit entries

vault.useFormAbove: Use the form above to store encrypted secrets

compliance.title: Compliance & Jurisdictions
compliance.subtitle: Built-in policy presets for major data protection regulations worldwide. Tier 1 jurisdictions have full PII type mappings; Tier 2 use the GDPR baseline as a starting point and will get jurisdiction-specific mappings in upcoming releases.
compliance.legend_full: Full PII type mapping specific to this jurisdiction.
compliance.legend_baseline: GDPR-equivalent baseline. Jurisdiction-specific mappings coming soon.

entities.title: Custom Entities
entities.subtitle: Define your own PII patterns to detect company-specific identifiers, internal codes, project IDs, or any custom data type. Patterns are stored in the database and loaded into the live detector immediately.
entities.empty_state: No custom entities yet. Create your first one above.
entities.confirm_delete: Delete entity '{name}'? This cannot be undone.
entities.created_success: Entity created and loaded into detector

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Receive HTTP POST notifications when a scan detects high-risk PII. Each webhook can be scoped to a minimum risk level and optionally signed with an HMAC-SHA256 secret for payload verification.
webhooks.empty_state: No webhooks registered. Create your first above.
webhooks.confirm_delete: Delete webhook '{name}'? This cannot be undone.
